name: use-reduced-motion
title: useReducedMotion
description: React hook — subscribes to the OS-level `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` media query and returns true when the user has asked the system to minimize non-essential animation. Shared dependency of every AF Werkschau animation primitive (SwipeIn, ScrollReveal, NotificationArrive, PressLike). WCAG 2.2 SC 2.3.3 compliance. SSR-safe (returns false on server).
